response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical curiosity, and a track record of building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of designing enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms with AI-first telemetry, guardrails, or cross-team rollout systems — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, C#, Java, and Python-like ecosystems
Proven ability to build and ship scalable infrastructure (e.g., real-time data systems, Kubernetes-deployed platforms)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership through workshops, mentoring, and tooling development
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems at scale
Limited demonstration of AI-driven engineering velocity or statistical analysis for bias/risk in experiments
Experience with distributed systems is present but not explicitly tied to multi-region, high-availability growth platforms
